utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You are sure ? You are absolutely sure ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_You are sure ? You are absolutely sure ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , no . But , um , I bet she probably does .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , I do not like that word .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I know what probably really means .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , oh , " Your mom probably will not kill herself , " you know ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am sorry , but I am not hanging all my hopes of Rachel and I living together on ... on " Probably ! "

emotion_cause.span: 8_I am not hanging all my hopes of Rachel and I living together on ... on " Probably ! "

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You gotta take care of yourselves !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: In this world history teaches us nothing !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Bing does not seem so weird now , does it ?
